name: Golden Crown Restaurant House Special Chow Me
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Peeled small shrimp (60 to 75 per pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil chow mein noodles according to package directions. Drain.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a wok or very large frying pan. Stir-fry noodles for 3 to 5 minutes, or until crisp and light brown. Remove from the wok and set aside.
3. Add remaining 2 tablespoons oil and garlic to the wok. Add bean sprouts, bok choy, carrot, green pepper, celery, water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, mushrooms, and onion. Stir-fry for several minutes over high heat.
4. Add shrimp, chicken, and barbecued pork. Continue stir-frying several minutes.
5. Add broth and cover with lid. Cook with lid on for 3 to 4 minutes.
6. Combine cornstarch with cold water. Stir in oyster sauce, sugar, MSG (if used), and salt.
7. Add the sauce and noodles to the wok. Continue cooking just until the sauce thickens about 1 minute. Serve immediately.
